_comment: Windows disk+memory golden candidate for Digital Corpora 2018 Lone Wolf scenario.
Official teacher guide is password-protected and faculty-gated, so this golden is report-output/scenario-derived until an authorized answer key is available.
Use as a Windows disk+memory coverage benchmark, not as an authoritative court-ready answer key.
license: Digital Corpora scenario data; see source terms and teacher-guide restrictions

lead_hypotheses.description: Cloud-client artifacts are expected because the scenario is designed for cloud-forensics analysis of client-side remnants
lead_hypotheses.artifact_hint: Browser, sync-client, file-system, registry, and application artifacts in the E01 set

lead_hypotheses.description: Planning or concerning-behavior artifacts should be sought across documents, browser history, downloads, and recovered files
lead_hypotheses.artifact_hint: Forensic Outputs package and disk image user-profile artifacts; exact answer key is teacher-guide gated

lead_hypotheses.description: Memory or pagefile data may corroborate active browser, cloud client, document, or user-session activity from the disk timeline
lead_hypotheses.artifact_hint: memdump.mem and pagefile.sys correlation with disk/user-profile artifacts; exact answer key is teacher-guide gated
